description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a flat wooden top and sturdy metal legs. The tabletop has a natural wood grain finish, giving it a warm and professional appearance. The legs are constructed from a combination of metal and wood, with a central support beam for added stability. The base of the legs features wide, flat metal feet that provide a solid foundation and prevent tipping. On one side, there is a visible adjustment lever or handle, suggesting the desk may have height-adjustable features. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a wood grain top, metal and wood legs, and a central support beam. Features a visible adjustment lever, suggesting height adjustability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wooden tabletop, the central support beam, and both metal legs with their wide feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the tabletop, the central wooden support, and the flat metal foot.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with less detail on the adjustment mechanism and a clear view of the support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the adjustment lever or handle on the central support, indicating possible height adjustment.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the adjustment lever and open leg space, while the opposite side is more closed with a central support panel.
